results.rendered_html: sthāyi—bhāva m. lasting or durable state of mind or feeling (said to be 8, viz. rati, hāsa, śoka, krodha, utsāha, bhaya, jugupsā, vismaya [qq.vv.], to which is sometimes added śama, ‘quietism’; they are opp. to the vyabhicāri-bhāvas or ‘transitory feelings’),  Bhar. ;  Daśar. ;  Sāh.  &c.
